name: S-55
events: 29 Mar 1943 S-55 possibly torpedoed and sank the German merchant Ajax (2297 GRT) off the Kongsfjord in position 70°49'N, 29°30'E.
I have also seen this ship listed as being sunk by S-101.
29 Apr 1943 S-55 torpedoed and sank the German merchant Sturzsee (708 BRT) off Nordkyn.
12 Oct 1943 S-55 torpedoed and sank the German Ammerland (5381 BRT) off the Porsangerfjord in position 70°59'N, 26°26'E.
